title: Immanuel J. Feld
text:
Bio
Welcome to my website which is still under construction.
I am a PhD candidate in economics at The University of Warwick.



Education
PhD in Economics, 2026 (expected) | University of Warwick
MRes in Economics, 2022 (with Distinction) | University of Warwick
MA in Economics, 2020 | University of Zurich
BSc in Economics and Business Administration, 2018 | Johann Wolfgang Goethe University, Frankfurt am Main



Research interests
Urban/Spatial Economics | Political Economy | Economic History

Bridging the gap: What would it take to narrow the UK’s productivity disparities? , The Resolution Foundation, June 2022 (with P Brandily, M Distefano, H Donnat, H Overman and K Shah)
